name: Stuffed Flank Steak with Marsala Mushroom Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/4 pound provolone cheese, cut into 1/3-inch julienne strips
1 ounce dried porcini mushrooms, soaked in 1/2 cup hot water for 15 minutes
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the carrot: Peel and halve lengthwise. Cut each half again lengthwise. Cut into thirds; you will have 12 sticks total.
2. Brown the sausage in a large soup pot. Remove and slice into rounds; set aside.
3. Add the stock, garlic, and several grindings of pepper to the soup pot. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer, scraping all the browned bits from the bottom of the pan.
4. Add the spinach mixture and cook for 60-90 minutes.
5. Uncover and add the sausage and escarole; cook until the escarole is soft.
6. Taste and adjust seasonings.
7. Serve with plenty of freshly grated Romano cheese.
